text: polos shelicha yeshu'a hamashicha biretson haelohim lefi havetachat hachayim asher beyeshu'a hamashicha
el-timotios beni hechaviv chesed verachamim veshalom meet elohim avinu umeet hamashicha yeshu'a adoneynu
mode ani lelohim asher anokhi 'oved oto mimey avotay berucha tehora ki-tamid ezekarekha bitefilotay layela veyomam
venikhesafeti lireotekha bezakheri et-dime'oteykha lema'an emale simecha
ki-sameti 'al libi zikheron emunatekha bileti-tsevu'a shekevar hayeta belois zeqenatekha uveaveniqi imekha umuvetach ani shehi gam-bakh
uva'avur zot azekirekha ki te'orer et-matenat haelohim asher bekha bisemikhat yadi
ki haelohim lo-natan lanu rucha eyma ki im-rucha gevura veahava umusar
lakhen al-tevosh lo me'edut adoneynu velo mimeni asiro ki im-teqabel kamoni hara'ot 'al-habesora bigevurat elohim
asher-hoshi'anu uqeraanu qeria qedosha lo khema'aseynu ki im-ka'atsato vechasedo hanitan lanu bamashicha yeshu'a lifeney yemot 'olam
ve'ata nigela beheraot moshi'enu yeshu'a hamashicha asher bila' hamavet vayotse laor et-hachayim veet asher-eynenu 'over 'al-yedey habesora
asher hafeqadeti liheyot lah lekharoz veshalicha umore hagoyim
uva'avur zot esebol kaele velo evosh ki-yada'eti bemi heemaneti vaani muvetach shebeyado lishemor et-piqedoni layom hahu
hachazeq betavenit hadevarim haberiim asher shama'eta mimeni baemuna uvaahava asher bamashicha yeshu'a
shemor et-hapiqadon hatov 'al-yedey rucha haqodesh hashokhen banu
zot ata yode'a ki-fanu mimeni kol asher beaseya uvetokham pugelos veharemogenis
yiten haadon rachamim leveyt onisiforos ki-fe'amim rabot heshiv et-nafeshi velo-vosh mimoseray
ki im-biheyoto veromi yaga' levaqesheni 'ad ki-metsaani
yitenenu haadon lerachamim lifeney yeho bayom hahu verov sheruto asher sheret beefesos ata yada'eta heytev
ve'ata beni hitechazeq bachesed asher bamashicha yeshu'a
veet-asher shama'eta mimeni bifeney 'edim rabim tafeqidenu bidey anashim neemanim asher-hem kesherim lelamed gam et-haacherim
veqabel hara'ot kegibor chayil bemilechemet yeshu'a hamashicha
ish yotse latsava lo yite'arev be'iseqey hachayim lema'an yiheye ratsuy lesar hatsava
vegam im-neevaq ish lo yukhetar im-lo yeaveq kamishepat
haikar ha'oved hu yokhel rishona miperi haadama
bin baasher-ani omer ki haadon yiten-lekha chakhema bekhal-davar
zakhor tizekor et yeshu'a hamashicha hane'or min-hametim asher hu mizera' david kivesorati
asher ba'avurah ani nose ra'ot 'ad lamoserot ke'ose 'avel aval devar haelohim eynenu chavush
ve'al-ken esebol et-kol lema'an habechirim lema'an yasigu gam-hema et-hateshu'a bamashicha yeshu'a 'im-kevod 'olamim
emet hadavar haze ki im-matenu ito gam-ito nicheye
im-nisebol gam-nimelokh ito veim-nekhachesh-bo gam-hu yekhachesh-banu
im-lo naamin hine hu qayam beemunato ki lo yukhal lekhachesh be'atsemo
zot hazeker lahem veha'ed lifeney haadon shel la'asoq betokhachat milim lo leho'il raq le'avet da'at hashome'im
heye shaqud lehiteyatsev neeman lifeney elohim ukhefo'el asher lo-yevosh hamechaleq 'al-nakhon devar haemet
aval tirechaq midiverey hevel hapesulim ki yosifu harebot resha'
vesichatam keraqav tokhal saviv umehem humenios ufilitos
asher ta'u min-haemet beameram kevar hayeta techiyat hametim vayevalebelu emunat achadim
visod haelohim eytan lo yimot veze chotamo yode'a yeho et asher-lo vekhal-haqore beshem yeho yasur me'avel
uvevayit gadol lo-kheley khesef vezahav bilevad ela gam-shel-'ets veshel-cheres umehem lekhavod umehem levizayon
vehine im-tihar ish et-nafesho meele yiheye kheli lekhavod mequdash umo'il laadon mukhan lekhal-ma'ase tov
berach-lekha mitaaot hane'urim uredof tsedeq veemuna veahava veshalom 'im-kol haqoreim el-adonay belev tahor
veharecheq min-hasheelot hatefelot beeyn musar mida'etekha ki-akh merivot molidot hena
ve'eved haadon lo yariv akh yehi-nocha lakol umevin lelamed vesavelan
umeyaser ba'anava et-hamakhechishim ulay yiten haelohim bilevavam lashuv velada'at haemet
veya'iru mereshet hasatan asher tsadam bah liretsono
vezot teda' ki beacharit hayamim yavou 'itim qashot
ki-yiheyu haanashim ohavey 'atsemam veohavey vetsa' umitehalalim vegeim umegadefim umamerim baavotam ukhefuyey tova velo chasidim
chaserey ahava uvogedim umaleshinim vezolelim veakhezarim vesneey tov
umoserim ufochazim ugevohey rucha veohavey 'adanim velo elohim
vaasher demut chasidut lahem umekhachashim bekhochah veata sur meele
ki-mehem hamiteganevim el-habatim veshovim ne'arot te'unot chataim venite'ot betaaot shonot
halmedot tamid ule'olam eynan yekholot lavo lidi'at haemet
ukhemo yanis veyameberis asher-qamu 'al-mshe ken gam-ele miteqomamim el-haemet anashim asher nishechata da'etam unelozim baemuna
aval lo-yosifu lehatselicha ki shige'onam yigale lakol kaasher qara gam-et-haanashim hahem
veata halakheta acharay bahoraa uvahanehaga uvaratson uvaemuna uveorekh harucha uvaahava uvasavelanut
uvaredifot uva'inuyim asher metsauni beaneteyokheya uveiqaneyon uvelusetera kama redifot savaleti umikulan hitsilani haadon
vekhal-hachafetsim bachasidut velicheyot bamashicha yeshu'a hema yeradefu
vaanashim ra'im veqosemim yosifu sara liheyot mate'im venite'im
aval ata 'amod baasher lamadeta uvaasher hafeqad itakh ki yode'a ata mi-hu asher lamadeta mimenu
umine'ureykha yada'eta et-kitevey haqodesh hayekholim lehachekimekha layeshu'a 'al-yedey haemuna bamashicha yeshu'a
ki khal-hakatuv nikhetav berucha elohim umo'il lehorot ulehokhicha uleyasher ulehaderikh bema'egeley tsedeq
lema'an asher-yiheye ish haelohim tamim umukhan lekhal-ma'ase tov
ve'ata hineni me'id bekha neged haelohim veneged adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha haba lishepot et-hachayim veet-hametim behofa'ato uvemalekhuto
hakherez et-hadavar vehatemed be'ito veshel ve'ito hokhach uge'ar vehazeher bekhal-orekhe-rucha vehoraa
ki-vo tavo ha'et asher lo-yakhilu et-haleqach habari ki im-keavat nafesham yaasefu lahem morim lesha'ashu'ey azenayim
veyatu azeneyhem min-haemet veyifenu el-hahagadot
aval ata heye 'er bakol sevol hara'ot va'ase melekhet hamevaser umale et-sherutekha
ki 'ata ze usakh nasekh ve'et petirati higi'a
hamilechama hatova nilechameti et-hamerutsa hishelameti et-haemuna natsareti
ume'ata shamur li keter hatsedaqa asher bayom hahu yiten li haadon hashofet hatsadiq velo-li levadi ki-lekhal-ohavey hofa'ato
chusha lavo elay bimehera
ki-dimas 'azavani beahavato et-ha'olam haze vayelekhe-lo letaseloniqi uqeriseqis halakh legalateya vetitos ledalemateya
veluqas hu levado 'imadi qach et-mareqos vahaviehu itakh ki yo'il-li limeod la'avoda
et-tukhiqos shalacheti leefesos
et-hamitepachat shehinacheti viteroas etsel qarepos haviehu itekha bevoekha veaf et-hasefarim ve'al-kulam et-kitevey haqelaf
alekhesanederos charash hanechshet 'asa li ra'ot rabot yeshalem-lo yeho kema'asayv
vegam-ata hishamer-lekha mimenu ki-mara et-devareynu
behitsetadeqi varishona lo-haya ish le'azereni ki-khulam 'azavuni al-techashev lahem le'aon
vadonay hu 'azarani vechizeqani lema'an tushelam 'al-yadi habesora veyishema'uha kal-hagoyim vaenatsel mipi areye
veyatsileni adonay mikal-ma'ase ra' veyoshi'eni lemalekhuto vashamayim lo hakavod le'olemey 'olamim amen
sheal lishelom periseqa va'aqilas uveyt onisiforos
arasetos nishear beqorinetos veet-terofimos hinacheti bemilitos ki chole hu
chusha lavo lifeney hasetayv ovulos ufudis velinos uqelodeya vehaachim kulam shoalim lishelomekha
adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha yehi 'im-ruchekha hachesed 'imakhem amen ﻿
